code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut pending_space = false
mut at_word_start = true
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not at_word_start
      pending_space = true
      at_word_start = true
    end
  else
    if pending_space
      result = "#{result} "
      pending_space = false
    end
    mut nb = b
    if at_word_start and b >= 97 and b <= 122
      nb = b - 32
    end
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(nb)}"
    at_word_start = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
